description: Maps a Wave businessType (e.g. restaurant/cafe/hotel) to an ERP Customer Group. Matched fuzzily: a configured key matches when it is contained in the incoming businessType; the longest matching key wins.

fields.description: Wave businessType, or a fragment of it (e.g. 'restaurant' to match 'restaurant/cafe/hotel').
fields.label: Wave Business Type

fields.description: Customer Group assigned to a B2B customer whose businessType matches this row.
fields.label: ERP Customer Group

fields.description: Optional human-readable note, shown in the mapping grid.
fields.label: Description

name: Wave Business Type Mapping
